title: How to use this website
text:
You should read the content provided in each section and chapter; however, you should NOT TAKE THEM FOR GRANTED. We are living in an information era where our understanding of the world is constantly evolving. My content can easily become outdated. Therefore, it’s essential to consider why we should learn these techniques, the purpose behind the development of a particular technique, and the motivations of the pioneers who first developed or invented these methods.
We believe that critical thinking will inspire you to better understand these concepts.

Moreover, we believe that:
your questions will truly enhance your skills as a thinker, leader, and communicator.

title: How to use this website
text:
Use preset questions first
We preset some important questions that are closely related to the concepts. We recommend you try to submit these questions first. Then, you can communicate with the assistant from EducateUsGPT to obtain more information on the other aspects of the concepts.






  Ask Educate Us GPT
  
    What is your name?
    
        
        
        Send

title: How to use this website
section: Ask EducateUsBot questions that arouse your interests
text:
Ask EducateUsBot questions that arouse your interests
You can continue asking questions such as:

What is your expertise?
Introduce yourself.
Your hobbies?
Who are you assistant for?
What is Data Mining?
Why Data Mining is so important nowadays?
What is the logistic regression model and show me an example?

title: About Us
text: This is the website for the course Data Mining for Business Analytics developed by Dr. Xiaorui Zhu with the help of ChatGPT.

title: Why we develop this website
text:
I believe start with asking why is an very important thinking track that could benefit us the most. Figuring out the real reason and purpose behind your move can really help you successfully communicating the passion behind the “Why”. Simon Sinek’s Golden Circle theory attempts to explain how successful leaders and organizations inspire others and differentiate themselves through communicate your “Why” to your customers.
 # Interactive learning of modern technologies



Engagement: Interactive learning actively involves learners, keeping them engaged and interested in the subject matter. This active participation promotes better retention of information. It helps students to try and error, learning from mistakes, and most importantly, understanding the reasons and purpose of why we should learn.
Customization: Interactive learning allows for personalized learning experiences tailored to individual needs and preferences. Learners can explore content at their own pace and focus on areas where they need improvement.
Feedback: Interactive learning platforms often provide immediate feedback, allowing learners to assess their understanding and progress in real-time. This feedback loop helps identify areas for improvement and promotes continuous learning. With the help of GPT techniques, we can have tailored feedbacks.
Collaboration: Interactive learning encourages collaboration among learners, fostering a sense of community and peer support. Collaborative activities promote critical thinking, communication skills, and teamwork.
Application: Interactive learning often involves hands-on activities, simulations, and real-world scenarios, allowing learners to apply theoretical knowledge to practical situations. This application-oriented approach enhances learning outcomes and prepares learners for real-world challenges.

title: Data Mining Overview
text:
Artificial Intelligence (AI)
The terms “artificial intelligence”, “machine learning”, and “data mining” are all used interchangeably. The boundaries between their definitions are ambiguous, with significant overlap. They delineate the uses of computer software to derive insightful solutions that conventional data analysis methods might struggle to attain.
In a broad context, artificial intelligence (AI) refers to computer systems exhibiting human-like intelligence and cognitive capabilities. Examples:

Deep Blue playing chess,
Alpha Go,
Watson

title: Data Mining Overview
Data Mining Overview
text:
Data Mining
Data mining entails the application of a range of analytical techniques crucial for the advancement of machine learning and artificial intelligence. It is widely acknowledged as a fundamental component of both fields. Through data mining, hidden patterns and relationships within data are unearthed, enabling the extraction of valuable insights to inform decision-making processes.

Difference between Data Mining and Machine Learning

Data mining focuses on discovering patterns and relationships in a given data
Machine learning focuses on training models and predicting future
A large overlap, but have different focuses
No need to distinguish them conceptually for our course
Article: Difference between Data Mining and Machine Learning
